summary: Completed testing of resizable text area feature in Support Tickets. Admin can now expand reply text areas when typing long messages. All three textarea fields (create ticket description, edit message, and reply) are properly resizable with vertical resize handles, min/max height constraints, and helpful hint text.
passed_tests: Support Tickets page loads correctly with 10 tickets
Ticket selection and details display working
Reply text area has resize: vertical CSS property
Reply text area has correct min-height (100px) and max-height (400px)
Resize hint text 'Drag the bottom edge to resize' is visible
Reply text area accepts input and displays correctly
Send Message button is functional and sends messages successfully
All admin navigation links present: Users, KYC, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers, Audit Logs
Create ticket description textarea is resizable (min: 120px, max: 400px) with hint text
Edit message textarea is resizable (min: 80px, max: 300px) - verified in code
